name: SF Small-game allowed/forbidden transit modes
allowed: Ferries embarking and disembarking within the game boundaries (Treasure Island Ferry)
Public bus services (Muni Coach & Trolley Coach, SamTrans, Golden Gate Transit)
Publicly accessible shuttle buses (PresidiGo, Golden Gate Park Free Shuttle, etc.)
Any other public mass transit service
forbidden: Private vehicles (taxi, rideshare, robotaxi, hitchhiking, chartered helicopter, etc.)
